title: Waiting Muscle Game
description: A gentle self-control workout that coaches children through longer waits using concrete tricks and celebrates every choice.
learningGoals: Practice delayed gratification in short, achievable intervals
Use physical and attention-shifting strategies while waiting
Name self-control as a strength that grows with practice
Make and celebrate an intentional choice after waiting
interactionModel: tap the large done step after each real-world waiting exercise; visible timers coach waits from ten seconds to one minute
feedbackModel: gentle gym-coach speech with sparkle, tick, and tada SFX; progress is framed as a growing waiting muscle and both final choices are celebrated

modes.title: Waiting Workout
modes.skill: delayed gratification using practical waiting tricks

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
